ITB_22_1_submission_deadline.text: Bids must be received on or before the deadline stated in the Tender Data Sheet.

Addendum_2_deadline_extension.text: The deadline for submission is extended to 14 June 2026, 10:00 EAT.

Addendum_2_validity_from_extended_deadli.text: For ITB 18.1 and ITB 19.3, bid validity and bid-security validity run from the extended submission deadline.

ITB_18_1_bid_validity.text: The bid validity period is 120 calendar days from the deadline for submission.

ITB_19_3_bid_security_validity.text: The bid security shall remain valid for 28 calendar days beyond the bid validity period.

base_rule.quote: The bid validity period is 120 calendar days from the deadline for submission.

amendment_addendum.quote: The deadline for submission is extended to 14 June 2026, 10:00 EAT. For ITB 18.1 and ITB 19.3, bid validity and bid-security validity run from the extended submission deadline.

controlling_deadline.quote: The deadline for submission is extended to 14 June 2026, 10:00 EAT.

dependent_validity_period.quote: The bid security shall remain valid for 28 calendar days beyond the bid validity period.

final_verdict.quote: Bid security required through 120 days + 28 days from extended deadline (14 Jun 2026 10:00 EAT).

primary.quote: Other protests shall be filed not later than 10 calendar days after the basis of protest is known or should have been known, whichever is earlier.

supporting.quote: Initial proposal deadline: 20 July 2026, 17:00 Eastern Time.

REVIEW_RULE.text: A party seeking review must file within 10 calendar days after receiving the Accounting Officer decision. For this demo family, Day 1 is the day after receipt. The deadline expires at 23:59 local time on Day 10.
